titleStmt.title: SII 29.110: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 110. (A.R. No. B. 568 of 1961-62.) KALLŪR, MANVI TALUK, RAICHUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab setup in the compound of the Māraṭēśvara temple [Second Face].

This incomplete record states that at the instance of mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Būchidēvarasa, his feudatories, such as heggaḍe Chāmaḍāṇa and another person (name lost) who was a mahāpradhāna and taṁtrapāla, made a grant of income from certain taxes for the haḍapa of god Mārateśvara. The guild of Hamnavaṇa-1000 made a grant of betel leaves for the same purpose. The record mentions the 500 svāmis of Mahānāḍu (the assembly) which was probably in-charge of the entire administration.
It is dated Chālukya Vikrama year 4 (the record year - 4 of Tailapa III) Śrīmukha, Pushya. śu. 8, Friday. uttarāyaṇa saṁkramaṇa corresponding to 1153 A.D., December 25, Friday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrīmaccāḷukya vikrama varṣada
4 neya śrīmukha saṁvatsa
rada puṣya śuddha 8 śukravāradaṁdu
ttarāyaṇa saṁkramaṇa nimittavāgi ©
svasti samasta praśasti sahitaṁ śrīmaṁ
mahāmaṇḍapē(ḷē)śvaraṁ būcidēva
rasa tatpāda padmōpajīvigaḷappa śrīma
nmahāpradhānaṁ taṁtrapāḻa
kaṇanu herggaḍe cāmaḍāṇanuṁ śrībū
cidēvarasara hēḻuvikeyiṁ śrīmatsarbbana
maśyadagrahāraṁ kallūra
śrīsvayaṁbhū māraṭēśvaradēvara ha
ḍapakke Ā sthāḻadaṁgaḻalli ha
ṇaviṁge hadineydele kīḷāya
vāgi naḍavudu Āyāyavaṁ
dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru ©
haṁnavaṇa sāsirbbaru neredu ko
ṭṭa dēvara haḍapa gavaḻige hēṟiṁgayva
ttele hēṟegippattaydu mahānāḍa
ynūrbba svāmigaḷu neredu sama
sta byavahāradalliyuṁ
Digital edition of SII 29.110 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
